title: Lossiemouth in Scotland among top Russian sabotage targets

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Lossiemouth in Scotland among top Russian sabotage targets. RAF Lossiemouth could be a prime target for Russian sabotage in a future confrontation with NATO, defence experts told MPs during a Defence...
